text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our summer camp training is beginning, and
Matikanefukukitaru is facing it with a grim
resolve.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, can you think of my current weaknesses
in terms of running the Kikuka Sho? Just give me
a rough outline.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ouch! But you are right on the money, even if you don't know how to pull a punch.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No one in my family came out ready to be a
stayer from the jump.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So I'm ill-suited for long distances, and on top of
that, I don't have a shred of talent! It's the perfect
recipe for failure!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However, despite my numerous faults, good
fortune has my back! To that end...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to scrape together as much good
fortune as I possibly can while we're here. I want
good fortune spilling out of my ears!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
First, we need to visit a shrine a hundred times for
good luck. Let's find one nearby to start building
our streak...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I don't see any around here. What could we
do instead...
choice_data_list:
How about a hundred shuttle runs on the
beach?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that sounds great! Back at it again with the
good ideas, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Repetition is a very important part of entreating
the divine. Now, let's hit the beach!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heave-ho, heave-ho, spinach leaf-o! Heave-ho,
heave-ho, spinach leaf-o!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heave-ho, heave-ho, spinach leaf-o! Heave-ho,
heave-ho, spinach leaf-o!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of her voice comes and goes in waves
each time she rapidly zips past me. Her journey to
find herself some luck, however, is only
beginning...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Clover of the four leaves... Four-leaf clover...
There must be a four-leaf clover somewh—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ahaaa! There's one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I found one, Trainer! Well, it's a bush clover, so it's not the real thing. Still, it has four leaves!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Lucky seashell, lucky seashell... Where are you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If I just kick away all this sand that's in the way...
Heave-ho, heave-ho!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa, there's murky water down here. Wait, is this crude oil? Talk about lucky!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, from this day on, the name's
Matikane-oil-tycoon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What should I do to end our search on a high
note?
choice_data_list: Find the golden scales of a fish.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Golden scales?! That sounds like it'd bring a load
of good fortune. I'd like to string them together
into a necklace and put it around my neck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Got to find the fish first. Look, some people over
there are going trawling!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, can I come with you guys? Caught any
golden sparkly fish?! Huh, just some goldfish?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru joins the fishermen on their
trawl. She doesn't end up finding a golden fish,
but she leaves the experience with a little more
upper-body strength.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wishing on a shooting star sounds good! I'm sure
there's a lot of stars to be seen around the island
south of here. I definitely want to get my wish in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hmm, nothing to see yet...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hmm, nothing tonight either...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: They just won't co—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there! I just saw one! We did it, Trainer! And
all it took was three days of patiently waiting!
Yippee!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Argh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's so excited, she forgets to make a wish. Still,
all that waiting has built her persistence.
